reviews.review_title: Be one with the blade young grasshopper!
reviews.review_description: This game is a total workout! Slashing dogging, swinging, punching, switching, spinning.  Have a large thermos of water near ya when playing.   Who needs a gym after this game.  Bumping beats as you climb the leader boards. The new ninja enemy is a nice surprise.   You think you clear a group then poof!  Ninja 🥷 strike!  I can't wait to see what evolves next hopefully boss rounds.  Great game for a great price!  Check out my video review on @ShantysBounty357.

Great game. Cheap. Good quality combat. Good visual quality.  Super fun. Exhausting.  Only 1 thing stands out as "bad", but really it's just early in development.... there are only 4 levels total so far. Each level has difficulty rating from : easy, normal,  hard, to god mode. So you can beat each level on 4 different difficulties making it feel more like 12 level kinda.... hopefully there's more added soon because it's one of the few games I really do recommend trying!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We have shipped an update with new cosmetic content this week and next updates will a new weapon mechanic, new weapon, new enemy and new levels. Come check out our progress in a week or two!

reviews.review_description:
You dodge, you smash, You Slice even dash. This game is perfection in every way. SFX is cool and point system is amazing. I just don’t know what else I need in this game because it is so polished, everything is so spot on and challenging. You learn fast but mastering is key to this game why is I replay it so much. Visuals are stunning and environment feels like yours there. Literally there is no other game that does visually this good stuff and it is super fun to play too!

You can play Tutorial/Challenge or Endless game modes here! You won’t be bored to play this one out for sure!
And one last thing, you don’t need Internet access to play this game when you have downloaded it on your headset.

This game stands out from the sea of generic fitness titles with its captivating artwork. The setting vividly evokes the Japanese Bakufu era, a time when the sword reigned supreme.

While the core is built on fitness, it avoids the monotony of endless punching. Instead, it blends fist strikes and swordplay, allowing you to clear stages with a satisfying, rhythmic flow. The highlight of the experience is definitely the Ultimate Gauge—building it up to unleash a devastating finishing blow on your enemies feels incredible!

Since the game is currently in Early Access, the variety of enemies and stage backgrounds is somewhat limited. However, the developer has already released a roadmap promising consistent updates, making the future of this title something to truly look forward to.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words! We definitely have planned some awesome stuff to come, so no need to worry about the amount of content.

reviews.review_description:
Be clear what this is. Just One Man from Raikari isn't a fully fleshed game. It's a focused testbed for the combat system the developer plans to build into a much larger VR MMO. Four challenge levels and an endless mode, all built around showing the combat off. 

The good news is that the combat is genuinely fun. A blend of Batman Arkham Shadow and Until You Fall with a touch of Vendetta Forever. Enemies telegraph their attacks; you respond with strikes, dodges, blocks. It's like an intense full-body quick-time event, and I mean that as a compliment. Style mechanics (sword spinning, hand swaps, backhand grips) reward flair and let you feel like an unstoppable one-man army. 

After about two hours I'd seen pretty much everything. At ten pounds it's defensible if you enjoy short mechanics-driven sessions and chasing high scores. If you need depth, wait to see what Raikari builds with this system next.

For the full impressions, search YouTube for 6DOF Reviews Just One Man.

developer_response.body: Thanks you for the extensive feedback and having watched your video, it was also very well made! You have hit the nail on the head with your description of the combat system, the games you mentioned were a big inspiration for us. We also agree with your cristicism, but we want to stress that we are still currently focusing on focusing 100% on delivering new content for this game. Hopefully we manage to bump up that "two hours" with our upcoming updates. Our next update is coming this week, which adds new unlockable content and customization for your weapons. Stay tuned for more!

reviews.review_description: Actually i have been playing since demo and is the only game i play right now,is not like the other games that feel boring after playing 5minutes,this is the type of game that you can play hours and do not feel bored

developer_response.body: We truly admire your dedication. Awesome to hear you've liked it!

reviews.review_description: The game is WAY different than the demo and I basically got it as soon as it came and it was just great. It would be better tho if there were more stuff to do because I already finished the normal challenges but it was great🥹❤️‍🩹

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! And no worries, we are already cooking more content for you guys! Make sure to follow us so you won't miss the new updates when they come.

reviews.review_description: It’s a fun little game and I really like the impact frames and it was so fun that I am number 2 in the leaderboards all I gotta suggest is more weapons￼

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback and thanks for being an active player, your highscore is impressive! We have an update coming soon which adds a new weapon and a new enemy, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I mean the game feels amazing to play! And you get a great workout on the side. I went and CRUSHED the leaderboards (been practising with the demo). Great game, really looking forward to what new content the devs are gonna add next. AND THE SOUNDTRACK IS FIRE!

developer_response.body: What are we cooking?

reviews.review_title: Most unique fighting game of all time
reviews.review_description: If your new to vr, this is a great game to start with, with multiple levels and difficulty’s to choose from!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the praise!

reviews.review_description:
JUST ONE MAN is a genre-defying fun game —a samurai experience that blends Beat Saber’s rhythm, Rager’s intensity, and Superhot’s precision into something entirely its own. The moment you step into its lush Asian landscapes, you feel the weight of every punch, every katana swing, and every special ability unleashed.
The tutorial is a standout—detailed, replayable, and actually helpful (a rarity in VR!). Whether you’re mastering boxing combos or chasing high scores in Endless Mode, the gameplay is tight, responsive, and endlessly satisfying. The mix of bare-handed combat and dual-katana chaos keeps every session fresh, while the challenge modes push your skills to the limit.
Early access? Sure, but this already feels like a complete experience. If you love VR combat with style, JUST ONE MAN is a unique experience.

developer_response.body: We greatly thank you for your all too generous words 😁

reviews.review_title: Great game, got to play before release
reviews.review_description: Im a content creator on TikTok who mainly posts blade and sorcery videos, but this game was really good. It’s very satisfying, fun, and rewarding when you get done with levels. It’s definitely a good game if you’re into vr workouts. Also, the potential this has is incredible.

developer_response.body: We definitely have seen overlap between B&S tiktokers and our game! Glad you liked it!

reviews.review_description: As one of it's beta testers, i must say they most definitely put their heart and soul into this game, i've seen no such thing as an action pvp game with timings like this on vr.. it's unreal.

developer_response.body: Thank you for being there with us from the beginning! Thanks for your praise!

reviews.review_description:
The mechanics feel very solid, love the Until You Fall style combat! The gameplay is so fun, addictive and very adrenaline pumping!!

Hoping for some more content. I am excited for future updates

developer_response.body: That is great to hear! And worry not, we are already cooking up more content for you guys to enjoy!

reviews.review_description: This is an extremely fun fast paced hack and slash game. I love how you can choose between using ur fists to fight or a sword and you can even flip the sword in the air and spin it and even use backhand.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the compliments! We are glad you enjoyed the weapon tricks! We want you to be able to look cool while fighting 😎 More stuff like that is coming 👍

reviews.review_description:
Very satisying combat and super cool visual effects! 6/5 would recommend! 

Also great workout and love the leaderboard so I can challenge the pros!

developer_response.body: Thanks, see you on the leaderboards!

reviews.review_description: This vr game is so challenging but feels so satisfying ! The devs nailed it

developer_response.body: We thank you wholeheartedly!

reviews.review_title: Such a fun fitness fighting game!
reviews.review_description: It's so fast paced, different maps and modes to choose and play, different powers, this game will go FAR!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! Make sure to stay tuned for more free content is coming!

reviews.review_description: The combat is smooth as hell and a great workout! Honestly just wish there was more to do!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the compliments! And don't worry about the amount of content, we will be adding free updates regularly.

reviews.review_description:
Just One Man delivers exactly what it promises: pure power fantasy. The combat feels fast, impactful and rewarding, with plenty of freedom to create your own combos and fighting style.

The scoring system encourages creativity, the abilities are fun to use and every battle feels like an action movie scene. If you enjoy stylish combat games, this one is easy to recommend.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the kind feedback!

reviews.review_description: The game is very good, the combat is so satisfying, but I prefer using sword then using my hand because I can to crazy trick with it but I can't believe people reach 7-8k point in the endless mode , because I can't even reach 2k🤣😂, but maybe I just need more practice to get better at this awesome game🔥 , overall 11/10 game🔥🔥

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome feedback 🔥🔥 Don't worry, with enough practise, you can top the leaderboards!

reviews.review_description: ⚔ The name of the game says it all !Want to get your body moving and your heart pumping , look no more ! this is the an amazing experience,  arcade style slice and dice like a samurai, realy fun and engaging experience. realy original fight mechanics that gets you moving while having fun ⚔

developer_response.body: We are happy to hear you enjoyed our game! Stay tuned for new content coming in the next couple of weeks.

reviews.review_title: Worth it, should be Meta game of the yea
reviews.review_description: This game is a MASTERPIECE ABSOLUTE PEAK,this style of the game is one of the best action packed games I've played.

developer_response.body: We'll accept the award 😁 Thank you!

reviews.review_title: I Finally Understand What Grandpa Meant
reviews.review_description:
My grandpa once told me that when you find The One, you’ll know.

It’s been 15 years since then, but I think I finally understand what he meant.

Just One Man is the most beautiful VR game imaginable. I get to train my samurai slicing skills and have the time of my life doing it. I was so excited I defecated myself.  
(Not because of the game though. Lactose overload. Bad timing... 😅)

I just wish grandpa was still here to see this…  
Sadly, he passed away from an infection caused by a tortoise bite during a trip to the Caribbean. 🐢💀

This slash is for you, grandpa.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear about your grandpa! But glad you liked our game!

reviews.review_description: When I first saw this game on a TikTok I thought it was heavily added in. The impact frames weren’t in the game but oh boy, I was wrong This game gameplay makes you feel like a bad*** and the ultimate don’t even give me a started I would recommend going to settings and turning on impact frames if you don’t have epilepsy I would like to see this game and add more mode maybe like a boss fights or something but for the prize, this game is super worth it

developer_response.body: That is great to hear! And don't worry, we will difinitely be adding more content for free, since this is Early Access after all. Boss fights are coming 😎

reviews.review_description: i don’t really play many games but out of the few vr combat games i have played this is up there , super fun game and it just released and i’m sure it can only get better , i have a content page where me and the ceo collaborated he was super chill and nice and we worked together awesomely . if you wanna check out my page it’s ironnomad on tiktok , love this game 🔥🔥

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the praise!
